notes: Before launching the game for the first time, rename or remove "PhysX" directory located in "$HOME/.steam/steam/steamapps/common/Steamworks Shared/_CommonRedist/". If you have launched the game before and now got PhysX SDK error, remove broken prefix first: "$HOME/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/380020/pfx". Then install PhysX using winetricks or protontricks.
title: Three Heroes
